item.title: Backfilling Without Tears
item.description: A malformed pubDate that feedparser cannot parse.

item.title: dbt Incremental Models, Revisited
item.pubDate: zzzzzzzz not even close to a date zzzzzzzz
item.description: An out-of-range date string that isn't a valid RFC-822/ISO date.

item.title: Column Lineage at Scale
item.description: One well-formed date alongside the two bad ones above.
